# Extracao: transcription_pdf_M5_DueDiligenceChecklist

- **Tipo:** TXT

---

• 	Shareholder information of the owners of the current company (name, ownership interest, how
long have they been an owner, etc?)
• 	Legal structure of the current company and acquisition target (if available) (LLC, S-corp, C-
Corp)
• 	List of any litigation (active, settled, etc.)
• 	List of any audits (financial, tax, or industry specific)
• 	Industry data for the current company and acquisition target
• 	Supplier or customer concentrations
• 	Material contracts
• 	Financing arrangements, in place and/or proposed in relation to the acquisition
• 	Employee contracts
• 	Equity earn-in agreements
• 	Licenses, any exclusive rights? Patents? Etc.
• 	Financial statements of the current company (last 3 years) and acquisition target (if available)
• 	Tax returns of current company (last 3 years)
